description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 19, 2025 at 9:55 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Brannan Street near 4th Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing southwest on Brannan Street in a queue of traffic for a red light at the intersection at 4th Street. The 
SUV stopped in front of the Waymo AV proceeded forward a short distance to close the distance with the vehicle in front of it, which was 
stopped at the red light. The Waymo AV followed by proceeding forward a short distance before both vehicles came to a stop. While the 
Waymo AV was proceeding forward, the SUV behind the Waymo AV proceeded forward as well, but did not stop when the Waymo AV 
came to a stop and the front of the SUV made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo 
AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
